name: Remote Shell Execution to a Container Detected
notes: This rule detects remote shell execution. An adversary might use this technique to execute arbitrary commands on a server. This could affect applications and data, and allow to pivot to other systems within the organization.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefiniton: Containers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Procedure/Trigger Execution
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [ssh or rsh]
TD_list: APPLY Remote Shell Execution to a Container Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefiniton: Containers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Procedure/Trigger Execution
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of [ssh or rsh]
RED_list: Event name: Remote Shell Execution to a Container Detected
Event description: Detects when a command has been sent through a remote shell.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
